text: Daily AI Research Brief What is worth tracking today Today’s high signal papers point to: . The notes below focus on the core problem, method signal, main claim, and keywords for each featured paper. Featured papers: core problem, method signal, and keywords Other papers worth tracking Preference Optimization for Safer Tool Agents: Covers tool use, execution feedback, and reusable capabilities; useful as an agent reliability lead. Red Teaming Open Source LLM Guardrails: Covers model safety, guardrail routing, risk classification, or governance evaluation; useful as a safety workflow lead. Synthetic Data Curation for Post Training: Covers a concrete data engineering signal; useful as a follow up candidate. Chart Understanding for Vision Language Models: Covers a concrete multimodal models signal; useful as a follow up candidate. Agentic 3D Modeling through Code Execution: Covers tool use, execution feedback, and reusable capabilities; useful as an agent reliability lead. Mechanistic Attribution for Factual Editing: Covers a concrete interpretability signal; useful as a follow up candidate. Video Diffusion Models Need Temporal Tests: Covers a concrete video generation signal; useful as a follow up candidate. Training Data Deduplication for Foundation Models: Covers tool use, execution feedback, and reusable capabilities; useful as an agent reliability lead. Low Rank Adapters as Model Memory Probes: Covers a concrete training and post training signal; useful as a follow up candidate. Robotics Policies with Memory Grounded Planning: Covers a concrete robotics and embodied ai signal; useful as a follow up candidate. Open Speech Agent Benchmark: Covers tool use, execution feedback, and reusable capabilities; useful as an agent reliability lead. Serving Quantized Models with Adaptive Batching: Covers inference cost, latency, throughput, and deployment constraints; useful for systems optimization. Reading boundaries Automated ranking favors papers with community, code, and applied engineering signals. Briefs are based on titles, abstracts, and public metadata by default, not full paper review. External API failures degrade optional signals and are reflected in internal records.

title: 今日 AI 论文简报

text: 今日 AI 论文简报 今天最值得跟进的方向 今天的高分论文主要指向：。下面按核心问题、方法线索、主要论点和关键词整理，便于快速判断后续跟进价值。 重点论文：核心问题、方法线索与关键词 其他值得关注 Preference Optimization for Safer Tool Agents：涉及工具调用、执行反馈和可复用能力，可作为 Agent 工作流可靠性的补充线索。 Red Teaming Open Source LLM Guardrails：涉及模型安全、护栏路由、风险分类或治理评测，可作为安全评测与治理工具链的补充线索。 Synthetic Data Curation for Post Training：涉及数据工程中的新任务、数据或系统线索，可作为后续跟进清单的一部分。 Chart Understanding for Vision Language Models：涉及多模态模型中的新任务、数据或系统线索，可作为后续跟进清单的一部分。 Agentic 3D Modeling through Code Execution：涉及工具调用、执行反馈和可复用能力，可作为 Agent 工作流可靠性的补充线索。 Mechanistic Attribution for Factual Editing：涉及可解释性中的新任务、数据或系统线索，可作为后续跟进清单的一部分。 Video Diffusion Models Need Temporal Tests：涉及视频生成中的新任务、数据或系统线索，可作为后续跟进清单的一部分。 Training Data Deduplication for Foundation Models：涉及工具调用、执行反馈和可复用能力，可作为 Agent 工作流可靠性的补充线索。 Low Rank Adapters as Model Memory Probes：涉及训练与后训练中的新任务、数据或系统线索，可作为后续跟进清单的一部分。 Robotics Policies with Memory Grounded Planning：涉及机器人与具身智能中的新任务、数据或系统线索，可作为后续跟进清单的一部分。 Open Speech Agent Benchmark：涉及工具调用、执行反馈和可复用能力，可作为 Agent 工作流可靠性的补充线索。 Serving Quantized Models with Adaptive Batching：涉及推理成本、延迟、吞吐和部署约束，可补充系统优化方向。 阅读边界 自动排序会偏向有社区信号、代码信号和工程关键词的论文。 简报默认基于标题、摘要和公开元数据，不替代全文精读。 外部 API 限流或不可用时，相关信号会降级为空并在内部记录中保留说明。
